V0713_01_00_00_0.text:
The name's Yuro!
But you can call me the champ!

V0713_01_00_01_0.text: A Rush Duel is the perfect name for a speedster like me!

V0713_01_00_03_0.text: Step on the accelerator and redline your ride!

V0713_01_00_04_0.text:
The racetrack is like my second home!
Let's go!

V0713_01_00_05_0.text:
You will Duel me.
Because you have no choice.

V0713_01_00_06_0.text: I know my siblings won't just hand me the win.

V0713_01_00_07_0.text:
One for six!
And six for Goha!

V0713_03_00_00_0.text: Can you keep up with my speed?

V0713_03_00_01_0.text: This is when I make my move!

V0713_03_00_02_0.text: Feel the wind in your hair!

V0713_03_00_04_0.text: The Duel's not over until they wave the checkered flag!

V0713_03_00_05_0.text: I don't have time to make a pit stop!

V0713_05_00_00_0.text: I'll pass you on the final lap!

V0713_07_09_00_0.text: This is the card I had Set!

V0713_07_09_01_0.text: I'll use the card I Set!

V0713_08_00_00_0.text: Your obstacles are nothing for an expert driver like me.

V0713_08_00_00_1.text: I activate the Spell Card, Against Buster!

V0713_08_00_01_0.text:
I activate my Field Spell!
Following World!

V0713_08_00_01_1.text: When this card is in play, Normal WIND monsters gain ATK!

V0713_08_00_03_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Storm Sonic!

V0713_08_00_04_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Thousand Attack Rocket!

V0713_08_00_05_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Harpie's Feather Duster!

V0713_08_00_06_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Backup Barrage!

V0713_09_00_00_0.text: I activate Air Formula Eagle's effect!

V0713_09_00_01_0.text: Mach Mega Falcon activates its effect!

V0713_11_00_00_0.text: I Summon a monster at supersonic speed!

V0713_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0713_11_03_00_0.text: I send a monster to the pit stop!

V0713_11_04_01_0.text: Only a president can Tribute Summon like this!

V0713_13_00_01_0.text:
Break the sound barrier!
Mach Mega Falcon!

V0713_13_00_05_0.text: Fazuzu the King of Mythical Wind Beasts!

V0713_13_00_11_0.text: Winged Dragon, Guardian of the Fortress #1!

V0713_19_00_00_0.text:
Air Formula Eagle!
Blow 'em off the tracks!

V0713_19_00_02_0.text:
Sky Dragon!
Force 'em into the pit lane!

V0713_19_00_05_0.text:
Fazuzu the King of Mythical Wind Beasts!
Attack!

V0713_19_00_11_0.text:
Winged Dragon, Guardian of the Fortress #1!
Attack!

V0713_19_00_17_0.text: Soitsu is gonna attack that fella!

V0713_21_00_00_0.text: This is why I'm the president.

V0713_21_00_01_0.text: Can you catch up to me?

V0713_21_00_02_0.text: You won't take the air out of my ride!

V0713_21_00_04_0.text:
You're up to something...
But what...

V0713_21_00_05_0.text: I'll enter your slipstream and wait for a chance to pass ya!

V0713_27_00_00_0.text: You almost drove me off the track...

V0713_27_00_01_0.text: Can't take much more of that...

V0713_28_00_00_0.text: The game's so fast - I can see why it's called a Rush Duel.

V0713_28_00_01_0.text: You don't have enough ATK to capture the checkered flag!

V0713_28_00_02_0.text: If I didn't drive as perfectly as I did, you would've won.

V0713_28_00_03_0.text: It was nice to live in the wind again.

V0713_28_00_04_0.text: I had enough gas in the tank to overtake you in the end!

V0713_28_00_05_0.text: Since I have the eye of an eagle, I saw all your flaws!

V0713_28_00_06_0.text:
One for six!
And six for Goha!

V0713_28_00_07_0.text:
The Lukeman!
You've been brainwashed by us - the Gohaliens!

V0713_29_00_01_0.text: Losing doesn't feel bad because I gave it my all.

V0713_29_00_02_0.text: I rather be free than stuck in an office.

V0713_29_00_03_0.text: The road I drive is just as important as the finish line.

V0713_29_00_04_0.text: Since I lost, I'll accept whatever punishment you choose.

V0713_30_00_00_0.text: In a Turbo Rush Duel, the speed of your ride is everything!

V0713_30_00_01_0.text: I'll let you borrow one of my vehicles. Pick your favorite.

V0713_30_00_02_0.text: I love the sensation of Summoning multiple monsters at once.

V0713_32_00_01_0.text: Full speed ahead to Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links!

V0713_33_00_02_0.text: I live for the wind and the air!

V0713_34_00_02_0.text: You have a lot of cards I've never seen before.

V0713_34_00_03_0.text: There's no bigger cheerleader of me than me!

V0713_34_00_08_0.text:
I can see your taillight.
I'm catching up!

V0713_34_00_09_0.text: I need to get you back for that fast.

V0713_34_00_10_0.text: When you least expect it... I step on the gas!

V0713_34_00_11_0.text: That's a little thank you for that move you did.

V0713_34_00_13_0.text: I'm the president of Goha Enterprises!

V0713_34_00_14_0.text: I know this won't work, but I gotta keep trying.

V0713_35_00_00_0.text: The Goha Six are the true presidents of Goha Enterprises!

V0713_35_00_01_0.text: Yuro Goha's returned from Goha Space Academy to take his rightful place as president!

V0713_36_00_02_0.text: I have to make a pit stop.

V0713_36_00_05_0.text: Yuran, I know you'll do great.

V0713_37_00_00_0.text: Fly faster than the speed of sound and cleave the skies!
